title: Resistance to Rust and Late Leafspot Diseases in Some Genotypes of Arachis hypogaea
abstract:
Resistance to rust (Puminia arachidis Speg.) and late leafspot
(Cercospridium personaturn (Berk. & Curt.) Deighton) in some
peanut genotypes was studied under field conditions. Late
leafspot development was also assessed in the glasshbuse and the
parameters lesion diameter, defoliation percentage and sporulation
gave highly significant correlations with the field disease
scores. Several genotypes were found to be resistant to both rust
and late leafspot and should be useful sources of multiple diseaseresistance
in a breeding program.
